pull.title: Use the new tuning API internally for `detail::select|three_way_partition::dispatch` and `DevicePartition`
pull.body:

- [x] No SASS changes for `cub.bench.partition.if.base` on SM`75;80;86;90;100`
- [x] No SASS changes for `cub.bench.partition.flagged.base` on SM`75;80;86;90;100`

Fixes: #8879
